title: spilanthes acmella
intro: Spilanthes acmella, also known as Acmella oleracea or Siam tulip, is a tropical plant native to Central and South America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and unique appearance. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its numerous health benefits. The health benefits of Spilanthes acmella include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Spilanthes acmella can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or supplement, and is also used as a culinary ingredient in some traditional cuisines.
